---
output: 
  html_document: 
    highlight: tango
    theme: cosmo
create_dir: true
---

![](figures/banner.svg)


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Hello Traveler
You just found [my](https://www.boku.ac.at/personen/person/6E56AD7273C135A3/)
very ephemeral web-presence. I hope to build it up very soon. 
In the mean-time feel free to contact me over at
[twitter](https://twitter.com/ido87).

An about page will also follow soon. Don't worry (yet).

# Projects

## [ allokkio ](allokkio/)

**Thinking by Tinkering.** A experiment blog where I collect short-notes, 
sketches and ideas. 

--- 

## [Epper Eppes](eppereppes/index.html) 

**Still a fledgling**. A (more ordered) complement to the craze of *allokkio*. 
Here I will collect lists, microsites, zines and similar things. 

---

## [Open Learning](open_learning_2017.html)
**Learn together.** *Season 2* of a project to share (some) of my learning efforts.
By and large it is inspired by [Una Kravets](https://github.com/una/personal-goals). 

---

## [visCOS](viscos/index.html)

**R**. The package `visCOS`, the package `cosCOS`; and the idea 
of `rrrCOS` are my take for providing a unified way to guide the 
calibration of the rainfall-runoff model COSERO from 'R'
